summary: Descriptive overview of landlordtenant in substantive law: leasehold estates, duties, remedies, eviction process.
key_points: leasehold estates is a fundamental concept in property law.
Legal standards for landlordtenant are established through case law and statutory interpretation.
Courts apply specific tests to determine landlordtenant in litigation.
The doctrine of landlordtenant has evolved through Supreme Court precedents.
Understanding landlordtenant requires analysis of both historical context and modern applications.
sources: Supreme Court opinions (Kelo v. New London)
philosophy_guard_statement: This fragment describes existing legal doctrines and their applications without advocating for normative changes.
